name: Mentor Corporation
description: Mentor Corporation was a leading global supplier of medical products for the aesthetic market, specializing in breast implants and other surgical aesthetic solutions. Headquartered in Santa Barbara, California, the company was a prominent player in the medical device industry before being acquired by Johnson & Johnson in January 2009. Following the acquisition, Mentor became a stand-alone business unit operating under Ethicon, Inc., a subsidiary of Johnson & Johnson, continuing its focus on providing innovative products for plastic and reconstructive surgery procedures worldwide.
